mapper.select: SELECT playlist_id, user_id, playlist_name, description, is_public, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM playlist WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId}
SELECT playlist_id, user_id, playlist_name, description, is_public, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM playlist WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT playlist_id, user_id, playlist_name, description, is_public, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM playlist WHERE is_public = true ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist WHERE is_public = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlist (user_id, playlist_name, description, is_public, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{playlistName}, #{description}, #{isPublic}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE playlist SET playlist_name = #{playlistName}, description = #{description}, is_public = #{isPublic}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId}
mapper.select: SELECT playlist_item_id, playlist_id, movie_id, sort_order, added_at, created_at, updated_at FROM playlist_item WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, added_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlist_item (playlist_id, movie_id, sort_order, added_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{playlistId}, #{movieId}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
